title: Microsoft 365 (OneDrive for Business) - Access Files in OneDrive for Business
body: OneDrive for Business via Outlook on the web OneDrive for Business via Desktop Sync Client Sync OneDrive for Business to my Computer OneDrive for Business via Outlook on the web Note: Only one file can be saved/exported at a time. Log in to Outlook on the web . Open the app launcher tool in the top left of your Outlook on the web window as shown below. Select OneDrive from the list of available apps. OneDrive app will launch within a new tab showing you all the files/folders you currently have stored in your OneDrive for Business storage. The file will either be downloaded (via your browser settings) or the file will be opened automatically. Use the associated application to save the file to the desired location on your computer. If you want to save the file to your computer, right-click on the file and select "Download" from the sub-menu. The file will be located within your download folder set within your browser settings. OneDrive for Business via Desktop This assumes you have installed/configured this client. Run/Start OneDrive for Business desktop application. Select the file(s) you want to save/export and copy them to your desired location on your computer. Sync OneDrive for Business to my Computer This process will allow you to sync your OneDrive for Business data from within your Office 365 account to your computer. Once synced, you can access (and modify) these files via your computer. Any changes made within your OneDrive for Business files on your computer will automatically be synced to your Office 365 account in the cloud. Log in to Outlook on the web . Open the app launcher tool in the top left of your Outlook on the web window as shown below. Select OneDrive from the list of available apps. OneDrive app will launch within a new tab showing you all the files/folders you currently have stored in your OneDrive for Business storage. Select the gear icon located at the top right area of your browser window. Within the drop down menu, select "Sync this OneDrive". Follow the prompts to sync/download your files to your computer. For additional resources, review Sync OneDrive for Business or site libraries to your computer .
